description: try-local demo home / honesty notice. Set as the Grafana home dashboard via GF_DASHBOARDS_DEFAULT_HOME_DASHBOARD_PATH so it is the FIRST thing a trial user sees — it frames the federation-revocation board as synthetic-data demo BEFORE they read the (real, prod) panels. This dashboard is try-local-ONLY; it is never provisioned in k8s.

links.title: Open: Federation Revocation Reconciler
links.tooltip: The real production security dashboard (synthetic data here)

options.content:
# 🧪 try-local demo — synthetic data

**No real reconciler runs here** (that needs Kubernetes + VictoriaLogs). These metrics are seeded by a small mock (`mock-reconciler`) so you can see the **shape** of a healthy federation-revocation security posture — and how the panels read *together* — without standing up a cluster.

In production a long-running reconciler (`helm/federation-reconciler`) emits these six metrics from **real** revocation-log-vs-live-set reconciliation: it compares the off-store revocation log against the live revoked set and raises `federation_revocation_tamper_suspected` if a revoked-but-still-live token has gone missing (an *un-revoke* — the ADR-028 tamper-evidence control behind tenant federation).

The dashboard itself and its thresholds are the **real production ones** (bind-mounted read-only from `k8s/03-monitoring/`) — only the *data* is a demo.

---

### → Open the board

**[Federation Revocation Reconciler](/d/federation-revocation)**  ·  everything should read calm-green:

| panel | healthy | means |
|---|---|---|
| **Tamper status** | ✓ Clean | no suspected un-revokes |
| **Reconciler freshness** | ✓ Fresh | reconcile is live (green sawtooth), not stale |
| **Gateway fail-open** | ✓ OK | revoked-set reads are succeeding |
| **Coverage integrity** | ✓ Intact | the event feed parses cleanly (no schema drift) |

_The chaos-scenario timeseries below those stat panels show what **bad** looks like (staleness climbing past 1800s, drops rising, tamper > 0) — here they stay flat/green because the mock emits a healthy resting state._

### → The real thing

See the runbook + design in the repo: **ADR-028** (federation revocation tamper-evidence) and `docs/grafana-dashboards.md`. To run the actual reconciler you deploy `helm/federation-reconciler` against a cluster with VictoriaLogs — out of scope for this one-command laptop demo.

title: try-local — Start Here (demo notice)
